question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the following words:

Euphoria, Reluctant, Mitigate, Omnipresent, Proactive
solution_html:
Euphoria – The entire stadium erupted in euphoria after the team’s last-minute victory.

Reluctant – She was reluctant to speak in front of the large crowd.

Mitigate – Proper planning can help mitigate the risks of failure.

Omnipresent – In the digital age, social media has become almost omnipresent in our lives.

Proactive- He played a very proactive role in implementing the project.

Mark Distribution:

For making meaningful sentence with the following words (0.5×5) =2.5 marks.

[N.B: Any sentence that is meaningful and correct will get allocated marks]

question_html:
Fill in the blanks with appropriate words from the following list:

(List: efficient, unity, goal, helpful, sincere, leadership)
‎ Achieving a significant (a) ______ in any organization or group requires not only clear vision but also (b) ______ effort and dedication from all members. Success depends on careful and (c) ______ planning, which ensures that resources are used wisely and obstacles are minimized. Effective (d) ______ plays a crucial role in motivating the team, making decisions, and maintaining focus on the objective. Moreover, (e) ______ among team members nurtures cooperation, mutual respect, and trust, which are essential for smooth collaboration. Every individual should be helpful and ready to assist others, understanding that collective progress depends on everyone’s contribution.
solution_html:
(a) goal

(b) sincere

(c) efficient

(d) leadership

(e) unity

Mark Distribution:

For filling the blanks with suitable words; (0.5×5) =2.5 marks.

question_html: Write a well organised paragraph on ‘The Importance of Honesty’ in the space provided, considering the element of a paragraph, such as topic sentence, supporting detail sentences and conclusion.
solution_html:
‘The Importance of Honesty’

Honesty is one of the most essential virtues that builds the foundation of trust in both personal and social life. It means speaking the truth, being sincere, and acting in a morally upright way. An honest person earns the respect and confidence of others, which strengthens relationships and creates a sense of integrity in society. In academic and professional life, honesty promotes fairness, accountability, and transparency—qualities that lead to long-term success and inner peace. Dishonesty, on the other hand, may offer temporary gain but ultimately results in distrust, shame, and failure. Therefore, honesty is not only a personal value but also a pillar of social harmony and moral strength. In every sphere of life, honesty truly proves to be the best policy.

Marks Distribution:

For writing Title, ‘The Importance of Honesty’; 0.5 mark.

For writing topic sentence such as, an honest person earns the respect and confidence of others, which strengthens relationships and creates a sense of integrity in society; 1.5 marks.

For writing supporting detail sentences such as, in academic and professional life, honesty promotes fairness, accountability, and transparency—qualities that lead to long-term success and inner peace. Dishonesty, on the other hand, may offer temporary gain but ultimately results in distrust, shame, and failure; 1.5 marks.

For writing conclusion such as, honesty is not only a personal value but also a pillar of social harmony and moral strength. In every sphere of life, honesty truly proves to be the best policy; 1.5 marks.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
